news.title:

Key representatives including CEO Ander Arenaza Alvarez to address the call at 12:30 hrs IST.

news.title:

Trading window will remain closed from 1st April to 25th April 2026 for designated persons.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India held investor meetings on 19th Mar 2026 in Mumbai.
Discussions included Q&A on documents available on the company's website; no UPSI shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
CIE Automotive India Ltd announces advance intimation of investor meetings on March 10, 2026.
An online group meeting, organized by Arihant Capital, is scheduled for March 10, 2026.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India Ltd announces advance intimation of investor meetings on March 10, 2026.
An online group meeting, organized by Arihant Capital, is scheduled for March 10, 2026.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India's Dec 2025 net sales rose 13.9% Y-o-Y to Rs 1,274.33 crore.
Quarterly net profit up 15%, EBITDA rose 14.9%, EPS increased to Rs 3.52; stock returned 21.1% in 12 months.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India's Dec 2025 net sales rose 13.9% Y-o-Y to Rs 1,274.33 crore.
Quarterly net profit up 15%, EBITDA rose 14.9%, EPS increased to Rs 3.52; stock returned 21.1% in 12 months.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India Ltd held an investor meet on 26th Feb 2026, organized by Kotak Securities in Mumbai.
Key investors like Matthews, Bajaj Holdings, and Blackrock attended; discussions focused on company presentations on its website.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India Ltd held an investor meet on 26th Feb 2026, organized by Kotak Securities in Mumbai.
Key investors like Matthews, Bajaj Holdings, and Blackrock attended; discussions focused on company presentations on its website.

news.title:
CIE Automotive plans higher capital expenditure for 2026; India expects better margins.
Optimism surrounds growth in India's automotive sector; Europe focuses on profit protection.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive plans higher capital expenditure for 2026; India expects better margins.
Optimism surrounds growth in India's automotive sector; Europe focuses on profit protection.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India breaks horizontal resistance with volume spike.
Stock trades above 50-day & 200-day MAs, forming higher highs and lows.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India breaks horizontal resistance with volume spike.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India reports 6% sales growth in CY2025 with INR 8,282M PAT.
The company plans capacity expansions and increased EV focus.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India reports 6% sales growth in CY2025 with INR 8,282M PAT.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India released Q4 and CY2025 results, sharing operational, market, and product details.
Subsidiary liquidation completed; sales split across products and geography disclosed.
news.summary:

news.title:
CIE Automotive India announces Rs. 7 final dividend per share for FY ending Dec 2025, subject to AGM approval.
27th AGM scheduled on April 29, 2026; record date set as April 22, 2026, for dividend eligibility.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India announces Rs. 7 final dividend per share for FY ending Dec 2025, subject to AGM approval.
27th AGM scheduled on April 29, 2026; record date set as April 22, 2026, for dividend eligibility.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India reports Q4 revenue of ₹12,743 mn, FY revenue at ₹48,964 mn.
Profit after tax stands at ₹1,336 mn for Q4, ₹6,169 mn for FY; ₹7/share dividend proposed.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India reports Q4 revenue of ₹12,743 mn, FY revenue at ₹48,964 mn.
Profit after tax stands at ₹1,336 mn for Q4, ₹6,169 mn for FY; ₹7/share dividend proposed.

Key representatives include CEO Ander Arenaza Alvarez and CFO K. Jayaprakash.
news.summary:

news.title:

Trading window remains closed from 1st Jan 2026 to 21st Feb 2026 as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
CIEALCAST acquired a 40% stake in AMPIN Energy Thirty One Pvt Ltd.
The investment ensures captive renewable power supply, reducing plant power costs.
news.summary:
CIEALCAST acquired a 40% stake in AMPIN Energy Thirty One Pvt Ltd.
The investment ensures captive renewable power supply, reducing plant power costs.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India completed its investment in AMP Energy, acquiring 13,12,500 equity shares in the second tranche for Rs. 1.31 crore.
Post-investment, CIE holds 40% equity in AMP Energy, aiding captive solar power generation to optimize factory power costs.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India completed its investment in AMP Energy, acquiring 13,12,500 equity shares in the second tranche for Rs. 1.31 crore.
Post-investment, CIE holds 40% equity in AMP Energy, aiding captive solar power generation to optimize factory power costs.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India surged 8.1% this week, while its five-year TSR hit 165%, boosted by dividends.
Despite 155% annual EPS growth over 5 years, market sentiment remains cautious with a 20% annual share price gain.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India surged 8.1% this week, while its five-year TSR hit 165%, boosted by dividends.
Despite 155% annual EPS growth over 5 years, market sentiment remains cautious with a 20% annual share price gain.

news.title:
CIE Automotive India Ltd's subsidiary, CIEALCAST, acquired 39.91% in AMPIN Energy Thirty One, investing Rs. 87.5 lakh.
The acquisition supports captive solar power for cost optimization, with full equity expected to reach 29% post second tranche.
news.summary:
CIE Automotive India Ltd's subsidiary, CIEALCAST, acquired 39.91% in AMPIN Energy Thirty One, investing Rs. 87.5 lakh.
The acquisition supports captive solar power for cost optimization, with full equity expected to reach 29% post second tranche.

Discussions included Q3 results, transcripts, and clarifications; no UPSI involved.
